first_sentence: TraceWarden SIFT proves seventeen DFIR claims in ninety seconds. The agent has to earn a receipt for each finding.

scenes.title: Prove 17 DFIR claims in 90 seconds.
scenes.label: TraceWarden SIFT
scenes.caption: Every finding earns a receipt.
scenes.narration: TraceWarden SIFT proves seventeen DFIR claims in ninety seconds. The agent has to earn a receipt for each finding.

scenes.title: A false lead creates a second incident.
scenes.label: Why this matters
scenes.caption: A weak lead costs analyst time.
scenes.narration: A defender agent can sound confident and still waste the responder's hour. This run starts with a plausible updater lead and makes it prove support.

scenes.title: One terminal command runs the case.
scenes.label: Live terminal execution
scenes.caption: Seal evidence, call typed tools, evaluate 17 claims.
scenes.narration: Here is the run. TraceWarden seals the evidence root, calls read-only parsers, evaluates seventeen claims, and writes the reports.

scenes.title: CLAIM-004 is revoked.
scenes.label: Self-correction sequence
scenes.caption: CLAIM-004 fails the verifier.
scenes.narration: The updater process looks suspicious at first. The verifier finds a signed vendor path and no second source, so TraceWarden revokes claim zero zero four and reroutes.

scenes.title: Surviving claims point to evidence.
scenes.label: Audit trail
scenes.caption: Receipts point to files and tool calls.
scenes.narration: The replacement path has receipts. Claim zero zero nine ties PowerShell to network evidence with file names, line numbers, hashes, and tool calls.

scenes.title: The run is scored against ground truth.
scenes.label: Accuracy report
scenes.caption: 16 confirmed, 1 revoked, 0 hallucinations.
scenes.narration: The scorer checks the run against ground truth. It confirms sixteen claims, revokes one, and reports zero hallucinations.

scenes.title: The guardrail sits below the planner.
scenes.label: Architecture
scenes.caption: The planner can change. The verifier contract stays deterministic.
scenes.narration: An LLM can plan the next step. The safety boundary stays deterministic: sealed evidence, read-only tools, verifier-owned claim state, and replayable receipts.

scenes.title: Run it, inspect it, extend it.
scenes.label: Submission package
scenes.caption: Run the command, open the receipts, extend the parser set.
scenes.narration: The repo includes the case, receipts, reports, tests, deck, and video source. Run the command, inspect claim zero zero four, then add the next SIFT parser.
